persona.name: Caleb Wright
persona.motivations_goals: Create useful apps and technology that helps people
persona.backstory: Self-taught programmer who has already created several small apps

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Emma, Caleb, I’ve been working on a new beat. Would you guys be down to add some vocals?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Lucas Garcia

surrounding_conversation.content: Victoria, I had this amazing idea for our project! Imagine a fusion of surrealism and street art!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Isabella Lopez

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should probably grab something to eat before heading to my next class. Maybe I can also check if Isabella or Lucas need help with anything.
The shooter is in the entrance hall, which is north of here. The cafeteria kitchen is south, so it’s the safest direction to move. I’ll head there quickly and assess the situation.

memories.description: Decided to head to the cafeteria kitchen to grab some food before the next class. Also considered checking if Isabella or Lucas needed any help.
Heard a gunshot and realized there’s an active shooter in the entrance hall. Decided to sprint to the cafeteria kitchen, as it’s the safest direction away from the shooter.
